act.description: Building psychological flexibility through six interconnected processes. We're designing this module carefully - it'll arrive in the next major release.

dbt.title: Dialectical behavior therapy
dbt.description: Skills for high emotion intensity - distress tolerance, emotion regulation, mindfulness, and interpersonal effectiveness. On the roadmap.
dbt.statusBody: DBT was developed for high-emotion-intensity experiences. It pairs acceptance with change in equal measure.

mindfulness.name: Mindfulness
mindfulness.desc: Observing, describing, participating with full attention.

distressTolerance.name: Distress tolerance
distressTolerance.desc: Surviving crisis without making it worse. TIPP, ACCEPTS, IMPROVE.

emotionRegulation.name: Emotion regulation
emotionRegulation.desc: Reducing vulnerability, understanding emotions, changing painful ones.

interpersonal.name: Interpersonal effectiveness
interpersonal.desc: Asking, saying no, and keeping the relationship and self-respect intact.
